concerns.text: FR-002 specifies a bandpass filter 'low-frequency to 40 Hz' but the Assumptions section and Idea Md specify '1-40 Hz'. The lower bound is undefined in the requirement, creating ambiguity for implementation.

FR-004 defines the MFN window as 'early post-error window' without specifying the exact time range (e.g., 200-400ms), whereas the Assumptions and Idea Md explicitly state '200-400ms'. The requirement should match the specific definition to ensure testability.

FR-006 requires sweeping thresholds over a 'representative set of angular values' but does not define the set. US-2 and SC-002 explicitly define the set as {5, 10, 15, 20} degrees. The requirement should reference this specific set to avoid implementation variance.

SC-005 cites 'N=47' as a constraint for computational feasibility. While the dataset size is a fact, Success Criteria in planning docs should ideally measure 'what' is measured against a reference, not hard-code empirical values like N=47 which are deferred to the data phase per the SC-001-004 pattern. However, since it defines a runtime constraint, it is borderline; a minor revision to phrase as 'the full available dataset' would be more consistent with the 'deferred' principle.
